management.title: Save Management
management.buttons.exportFullTitle: Export all profiles, saves, vectors, settings, and aga_* config
management.buttons.importDemoTreeTitle: Raw JSON state tree (contains metadata/character), writes to first character's new slot
management.modals.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete character "{name}" and all its saves? This action cannot be undone.
management.errors.saveCorrupted: Save data does not exist or is corrupted
management.errors.exportNoData: Cannot export: save data does not exist
management.errors.invalidStateTree: Not a valid state tree root (must contain top-level keys like metadata or character)
management.errors.noProfilesForImport: Please create at least one character first
management.dialogs.importFullBackupConfi: This will restore all profiles, saves, vectors, and settings from the backup file. It is recommended to export the current full backup first to prevent data loss. Continue?
